name: City Mechanics
mission: Keeping the city's engine running through expert tuning, repair, and modification.
vision: A network of specialized mechanic shops each offering distinct parts, aesthetics, and tuning potentials.

basic: Charge standard rates based on the global city economy.
Tow trucks must not obstruct major thoroughfares.
Always remain in character when explaining technical vehicle damage.
advanced: Stance modifications and illegal engine swaps carry legal repercussions.
Do not 'insta-repair' without sufficient RP backing it.
Stock inventory must be manually restocked via logistics contracts.

roles.name: Shop Owner
roles.desc: Manages repair rates, custom part orders, and the payroll.

roles.name: Lead Mechanic
roles.desc: Expert in engine tuning and complete interior swaps.

roles.name: Bodywork Specialist
roles.desc: Handles aesthetic modifications, paints, and stances.

roles.name: Tow Technician
roles.desc: City-contracted cleanup of abandoned or damaged vehicles.
